name: Chicken Parmigiana 2
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the first four ingredients in a shallow bowl.
2. Dip each chicken breast in the beaten egg.
3. Roll each chicken breast in the bread crumb mixture to coat evenly.
4. Place the chicken on a cookie sheet or jelly-roll pan.
5. Bake in a preheated 375°F oven for 10 minutes.
6. Turn the chicken over and bake for an additional 10-12 minutes, or until thoroughly cooked.
7. Spoon tomato sauce over each chicken breast.
8. Sprinkle cheese evenly over top of the chicken.
9. Bake for an additional 3 minutes, or until the cheese is melted.
